se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.config.configurers.Saml2IdpMetadataEndpointConfigurer

Package
Description
se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.config.configurers
Configurers for the SAML Identity Provider.

  • Uses of Saml2IdpMetadataEndpointConfigurer in se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.config.configurers

    Methods in se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.config.configurers that return Saml2IdpMetadataEndpointConfigurer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Saml2IdpMetadataEndpointConfigurer
    Saml2IdpMetadataEndpointConfigurer.entityDescriptorCustomizer(org.springframework.security.config.Customizer<EntityDescriptor> metadataCustomizer)
    Sets the Customizer providing access to the EntityDescriptor allowing the ability to customize how the published IdP metadata is constructed.
    Method parameters in se.swedenconnect.spring.saml.idp.config.configurers with type arguments of type Saml2IdpMetadataEndpointConfigurer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Saml2IdpConfigurer
    Saml2IdpConfigurer.idpMetadataEndpoint(org.springframework.security.config.Customizer<Saml2IdpMetadataEndpointConfigurer> customizer)
    Customizes the IdP metadata endpoint.
